# Korea to Pilot $1B CBDC Bond Test 2027

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | July 14, 2026*

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
South Korea will test tokenized government bonds linked to the Bank of Korea’s wholesale CBDC system in 2027 as token securities rules take effect.

# Birla Secures $1.5B Loan from MUFG

*MarketFlock Lead Analyst | July 14, 2026*

---

## 🎯 The Intelligence Signal
A unit of billionaire Kumar Mangalam Birla’s conglomerate has lined up around $1.5 billion of acquisition financing from Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group Inc. to fund its purchase of Shell Plc’s renewable energy assets in the country, according to people familiar with the matter.
